item.title: More of my notes on DeepSeek V4 - the really big news is the pricing: both DeepSeek-V4-Flash and Dee...
item.description:
More of my notes on DeepSeek V4 - the really big news is the pricing: both DeepSeek-V4-Flash and DeepSeek-V4-Pro are the cheapest models in their categories while benchmarking close to the frontier models from other providers https://t.co/QQ2iFd4BDr https://t.co/0R0DFYYpSx
--- @simonw | ❤️ 24 | 🔁 1 | 💬 1 | 👁 1625
item.author: @simonw

item.title:
Ask and be rewarded! 🙌
Come #AskBinance and your question could get answered...
All you need to d...
item.description:
Ask and be rewarded! 🙌
Come #AskBinance and your question could get answered...
All you need to do: 1️⃣ Like + repost 2️⃣ Comment with your question + #AskBinance hashtag 3️⃣ Complete survey 👉 https://t.co/5IZ1B4I1kG
200 USDC will be given to each user whose question has been chosen.
Ends 26 Apr 23:59 UTC
--- @binance | ❤️ 516 | 🔁 331 | 💬 346 | 👁 17891
item.author: @binance
